response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical breadth and roughly 17 years of hands-on engineering experience, which clears the minimum bar, but the role is a director-level AI strategy IC requiring recognized AI expertise, cloud platform advisory experience, and the ability to influence enterprise customers and shape product roadmaps — none of which are evidenced in the resume. His AI work is limited to his current role (MCP tooling, agentic workflows) and is very recent, his cloud exposure is as a consumer rather than a strategist, and his seniority trajectory has plateaued at Senior/Staff developer level rather than progressing toward principal or advisory leadership.
strengths: Meets the 15-year experience floor with demonstrated breadth across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains
Early-stage AI-agent and MCP framework work at re:cinq shows genuine technical curiosity in the AI space
Founder and open-source platform experience (GISCollective) demonstrates entrepreneurial initiative
concerns: No recognized AI expertise, published research, or AI-powered products at scale — the AI work is shallow and very recent
Career trajectory has remained at Senior/Staff IC level with no evidence of growing toward principal or director-level strategic scope
No cloud strategy, enterprise advisory, or thought-leadership experience of the kind required to advise strategic customers and partners

key_factors.factor: Lack of AI depth and recognition
